commands.program_description: Paperclip CLI — setup, diagnose, and configure your instance
commands.data_dir_help: Paperclip data directory root (isolates state from ~/.paperclip)
commands.onboard_run_option: Start Paperclip immediately after saving config
commands.doctor_description: Run diagnostic checks on your Paperclip setup
commands.configure_section_option: Section to configure (llm, database, logging, server, storage, secrets)
commands.db_backup_description: Create a one-off database backup using current config
commands.allowed_hostname_description: Allow a hostname for authenticated/private mode access
commands.run_description: Bootstrap local setup (onboard + doctor) and run Paperclip
commands.heartbeat_run_description: Run one agent heartbeat and stream live logs
commands.heartbeat_api_base_option: Base URL for the Paperclip server API
commands.heartbeat_timeout_option: Max time to wait before giving up
commands.heartbeat_debug_option: Show raw adapter stdout/stderr JSON chunks
commands.auth_bootstrap_ceo_description: Create a one-time bootstrap invite URL for first instance admin
commands.auth_bootstrap_force_option: Create new invite even if admin already exists
commands.auth_bootstrap_base_url_option: Public base URL used to print invite link

onboard.config_invalid:
Existing config appears invalid and will be updated.
{{error}}
onboard.existing_detected: Existing Paperclip install detected; keeping the current configuration unchanged.
onboard.use_configure: Use {{command}} if you want to change settings.
onboard.secrets_key_created: Created local secrets key file at {{path}}
onboard.secrets_key_existing: Using existing local secrets key file at {{path}}
onboard.quickstart_hint: Recommended: local defaults + ready to run
onboard.advanced_hint: Customize database, server, storage, and more
onboard.db_connection_failed: Could not connect to database — you can fix this later with `paperclipai doctor`
onboard.api_key_invalid: API key appears invalid — you can update it later
onboard.api_key_unknown: Could not validate API key — continuing anyway
onboard.api_unreachable: Could not reach API — continuing anyway
onboard.env_aware_defaults: Environment-aware defaults active ({{count}} env var(s) detected).
onboard.no_env_overrides: No environment overrides detected: embedded database, file storage, local encrypted secrets.
onboard.bootstrap_ceo_later: Bootstrap CEO invite will be created after the server starts.

doctor.all_critical_passed: All critical checks passed with some warnings.
doctor.some_failed: Some checks failed. Fix the issues above and re-run doctor.

database.connection_string_required: Connection string is required for PostgreSQL mode
database.connection_string_protocol: Must be a postgres:// or postgresql:// URL
database.port_validation: Port must be an integer between 1 and 65535
database.backup_interval_positive: Interval must be a positive integer
database.backup_interval_max: Interval must be 10080 minutes (7 days) or less
database.backup_retention_positive: Retention must be a positive integer
database.backup_retention_max: Retention must be 3650 days or less

server.local_trusted_hint: Easiest for local setup (no login, localhost-only)
server.authenticated_hint: Login required; use for private network or public hosting
server.private_hint: Private access (for example Tailscale), lower setup friction
server.port_validation: Must be an integer between 1 and 65535
server.public_url_required: Public base URL is required for public exposure
server.public_url_protocol: URL must start with http:// or https://

secrets.strict_mode_message: Require secret refs for sensitive env vars?
secrets.provider_not_wired: {{provider}} is not fully wired in this build yet. Keep local_encrypted unless you are actively implementing that adapter.

logging.cloud_coming_soon: Cloud logging is coming soon. Using file-based logging for now.
